# Generated by ArchitectGen. Manual edits may be overwritten.

set(domain_public_headers
    NewClass1.h
    NewClass2.h
)

set(domain_sources
    NewClass1.cpp
    NewClass2.cpp
)

add_library(Data_Persistence
    ${domain_sources}
    ${domain_public_headers}
)

add_library(ArchitectGen::Data_Persistence ALIAS Data_Persistence)

target_compile_features(Data_Persistence PUBLIC cxx_std_17)

target_include_directories(Data_Persistence
    PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/ArchitectGen/Data_Persistence>
)

target_link_libraries(Data_Persistence
    PUBLIC
        Qt${QT_VERSION_MAJOR}::Core
        Qt${QT_VERSION_MAJOR}::Widgets
)

install(TARGETS Data_Persistence
    EXPORT ArchitectGenTargets
    ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
    LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
    RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR}
)

install(FILES
    ${domain_public_headers}
    DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/ArchitectGen/Data_Persistence
)
